metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_1797
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Both peak fluorescence and rate of synaptopHluorin re-uptake in Drp1 depleted cells were decreased when compared with scrambled shRNA controls (Fig. 5e). Drp1 depletion was rescued by overexpression of an shRNA-resistant Drp1 construct (Fig. 5f).

Drp1-shRNA-expressing synapses showed multiple large vesicular structures (Fig. 7b). In addition, measurable synaptic vesicle area in electron micrographs of Drp1-depleted synapses was more variable and contained larger vesicles than controls (Fig. 7c).. Experimental description: From the methods, "Primary rat hippocampal neurons were prepared as described previously..."
